title: elatostema goudotianum var. lemoinei
intro: Elatostema goudotianum var. lemoinei, also known as Lemoine's watercress vine or lemoine's elatostema, is a type of flowering plant in the Urticaceae family. This plant is known to have medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Elatostema goudotianum var. lemoinei include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help in reducing inflammation and oxidative stress in the body. The leaves can be prepared as a tea or added to herbal infusions for its medicinal benefits, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions.
